title: Multi-Currency Deferred — Single Default Currency for MVP
statement: The MVP MUST operate in a single default currency. Multi-currency support (currency conversion, exchange rates, currency-aware account balances) is explicitly out of scope for the MVP and MUST NOT be built until the core single-currency app is stable. The schema design SHOULD leave room for a future Currency entity without requiring a breaking migration.
source: Plan — User Review Required: Multi-currency deferred warning
